## 🎯 **OPERATIONAL DIRECTIVES**

<div align="center">

<table>
<tr>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 🔴 **RED TEAM OPERATIONS**
```yaml
Mission_Status: ACTIVE
Threat_Level: MAXIMUM
Operations:
  Reconnaissance:
    - Network Mapping
    - OSINT Gathering
    - Social Engineering
    - Vulnerability Discovery
  
  Exploitation:
    - Custom Payload Development
    - Zero-Day Research
    - Privilege Escalation
    - Lateral Movement
  
  Post_Exploitation:
    - Data Exfiltration
    - Persistence Mechanisms
    - Anti-Forensics
    - Command & Control

Arsenal:
  - RavenTrace Toolkit
  - Custom Python Scripts
  - Metasploit Framework
  - Cobalt Strike
  - Custom C2 Infrastructure
```

</td>
<td width="50%" valign="top">

### 🔵 **BLUE TEAM DEFENSE**
```yaml
Defense_Status: FORTIFIED
Alert_Level: GREEN
Capabilities:
  Detection:
    - SIEM Management
    - Log Analysis
    - Threat Hunting
    - Behavioral Analytics
  
  Analysis:
    - Malware Reverse Engineering
    - Digital Forensics
    - Memory Analysis
    - Network Forensics
  
  Response:
    - Incident Response
    - Threat Intelligence
    - IOC Development
    - Containment Strategies

Tools:
  - Splunk Enterprise
  - Volatility Framework
  - Autopsy Digital Forensics
  - Wazuh SIEM
  - Custom Detection Rules
```

</td>
</tr>
</table>

</div>

<!-- Terminal Command Showcase -->
<div align="center">

```bash
┌─[mystic707@matrix]─[~/operations]
└──╼ $ ./raventrace --scan --target corporate.network --stealth-mode
[+] Initializing RavenTrace v2.1.0
[+] Stealth mode: ENABLED
[+] Target acquired: corporate.network
[+] Scanning 65535 ports...
[+] Discovered 23 open services
[+] Vulnerability assessment: COMPLETE
[+] Exploitation vectors identified: 7
[+] Ready for deployment...

┌─[mystic707@matrix]─[~/forensics]
└──╼ $ volatility -f memory.dump --profile=Win10x64 pslist
[+] Analyzing memory dump...
[+] Suspicious process detected: svchost.exe (PID: 1337)
[+] Malware signature match: 98.7%
[+] Extracting IOCs...
[+] Investigation complete.
```

</div>

```ascii
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  🔥 RAVENTRACE - Advanced Red Team Reconnaissance Toolkit                  │
│  ├─ 🎯 Multi-threaded Network Discovery & Port Scanning                    │
│  ├─ 🕵️ OSINT Automation & Social Engineering Modules                       │
│  ├─ 💥 Vulnerability Assessment & Exploitation Framework                   │
│  ├─ 🔐 Encrypted C2 Communications & Payload Delivery                      │
│  ├─ 🛡️ Anti-Detection & Evasion Techniques                                 │
│  └─ 📊 Real-time Reporting & Intelligence Gathering                        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  💰 CRYPTO INVESTMENT PLATFORM - Real-time Trading Dashboard               │
│  ├─ 📈 Live Price Feeds & Market Analysis                                  │
│  ├─ 🤖 Automated Trading Algorithms                                         │
│  ├─ 📊 Portfolio Management & Risk Assessment                              │
│  ├─ 🔔 Smart Alerts & Notification System                                  │
│  └─ 🔒 Secure Wallet Integration & Multi-factor Authentication             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://readme-typing-svg.herokuapp.com?font=Fira+Code&size=18&duration=4000&pause=2000&color=00FF41&center=true&vCenter=true&width=600&lines=The+Matrix+has+you...;Follow+the+white+rabbit.;There+is+no+spoon.;Welcome+to+the+real+world.;Stay+curious.+Stay+secure." alt="Matrix Quotes"/>

<!-- Hidden Easter Egg -->
<!-- 
01001000 01100101 01101100 01101100 01101111 00100000 01010111 01101111 01110010 01101100 01100100
If you can decode this, you're worthy of joining the resistance.
Contact: mystic707@matrix.net (PGP: 0x1337DEADBEEF)
-->
